mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_chat_room (partition_id, room_code, room_name, room_type, status) VALUES (#{partitionId}, #{roomCode}, #{roomName}, #{roomType}, #{status})
INSERT INTO forum_chat_room (partition_id, room_code, name, status) VALUES (#{partitionId}, #{roomCode}, #{roomName}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_chat_room SET partition_id = #{partitionId}, room_code = #{roomCode}, room_name = #{roomName}, room_type = #{roomType}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_chat_room SET partition_id = #{partitionId}, room_code = #{roomCode}, name = #{roomName}, status = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.partition_id, p.partition_code, p.partition_name, r.room_code, r.room_name, r.room_type, r.status, CASE WHEN m.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS joined, COUNT(all_m.id) AS member_count FROM forum_chat_room r JOIN forum_interest_partition p ON p.id = r.partition_id LEFT JOIN forum_chat_member m ON m.room_id = r.id AND m.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN forum_chat_member all_m ON all_m.room_id = r.id WHERE r.status = 'ENABLED' AND p.status = 'ENABLED' GROUP BY r.id, r.partition_id, p.partition_code, p.partition_name, p.sort_order, p.id, r.room_code, r.room_name, r.room_type, r.status, m.id ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.id ASC, r.id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.partition_id, p.partition_code, p.partition_name, r.room_code, r.name AS room_name, 'PUBLIC' AS room_type, CASE WHEN r.status = 1 THEN 'ENABLED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status, 1 AS joined, 0 AS member_count FROM forum_chat_room r JOIN forum_interest_partition p ON p.id = r.partition_id WHERE r.status = 1 AND p.status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.id ASC, r.id ASC
SELECT r.*, p.partition_code, p.partition_name FROM forum_chat_room r JOIN forum_interest_partition p ON p.id = r.partition_id WHERE r.room_code = #{roomCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.partition_id, p.partition_code, p.partition_name, r.room_code, r.name AS room_name, 'PUBLIC' AS room_type, CASE WHEN r.status = 1 THEN 'ENABLED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status FROM forum_chat_room r JOIN forum_interest_partition p ON p.id = r.partition_id WHERE r.room_code = #{roomCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT r.*, p.partition_code, p.partition_name FROM forum_chat_room r JOIN forum_interest_partition p ON p.id = r.partition_id WHERE r.room_name = #{roomName} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.partition_id, p.partition_code, p.partition_name, r.room_code, r.name AS room_name, 'PUBLIC' AS room_type, CASE WHEN r.status = 1 THEN 'ENABLED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status FROM forum_chat_room r JOIN forum_interest_partition p ON p.id = r.partition_id WHERE r.name = #{roomName} LIMIT 1
SELECT r.*, p.partition_code, p.partition_name FROM forum_chat_room r JOIN forum_interest_partition p ON p.id = r.partition_id WHERE r.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.partition_id, p.partition_code, p.partition_name, r.room_code, r.name AS room_name, 'PUBLIC' AS room_type, CASE WHEN r.status = 1 THEN 'ENABLED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status FROM forum_chat_room r JOIN forum_interest_partition p ON p.id = r.partition_id WHERE r.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
